{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Blue Titan key
| introduced = The Knight
}}

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The key to the [[Blue Titan]] is a palm-sized badge.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41">''The Knight'', chapter 41</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Horizon, can you locate the key to the Blue Titan?” I asked. Magic shimmered in midair, and the palm-sized badge fell into my hand.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c41" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
